Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service, StorageService

# Test get_mime_type
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('report.pdf'\) == 'application/pdf'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('data.xlsx'\) == 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('unknown.xyz'\) == 'application/octet-stream'
print\('get_mime_type OK'\)

# Test save_file with a mock UploadFile
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test_doc.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

rel_path, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=42\)
print\(f'save_file OK: {rel_path}, {size} bytes'\)
assert rel_path.startswith\('1/42/'\)
assert size == len\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

# Test get_file_path
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
print\(f'get_file_path OK: {abs_path}'\)

# Test delete_file
deleted = storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\)
assert deleted is True
print\('delete_file \(existing\) OK'\)

# Test delete_file idempotent
deleted_again = storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\)
assert deleted_again is False
print\('delete_file \(missing\) OK - idempotent'\)

# Test get_file_path raises on missing
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except FileNotFoundError:
    print\('get_file_path raises FileNotFoundError OK'\)

# Test save without contratto
mock_file2 = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file2.filename = 'busta.pdf'
mock_file2.file = io.BytesIO\(b'data'\)
rel2, _ = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file2, cliente_id=5, contratto_id=None\)
assert rel2.startswith\('5/senza_contratto/'\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel2\)
print\('save_file without contratto OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('All tests passed'\)
" 2>&1)

import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service

# Test get_mime_type
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('report.pdf'\) == 'application/pdf'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('unknown.xyz'\) == 'application/octet-stream'
print\('get_mime_type OK'\)

# Test save_file
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test_doc.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)
rel_path, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=42\)
print\(f'save_file OK: {rel_path}, {size} bytes'\)
assert rel_path.startswith\('1/42/'\)
assert size == len\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

# Test get_file_path
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
print\(f'get_file_path OK'\)

# Test delete_file
assert storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\) is True
print\('delete_file \(existing\) OK'\)
assert storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\) is False
print\('delete_file \(missing\) idempotent OK'\)

# Test get_file_path raises on missing
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except FileNotFoundError:
    print\('get_file_path raises FileNotFoundError OK'\)

# Test save without contratto
mock_file2 = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file2.filename = 'busta.pdf'
mock_file2.file = io.BytesIO\(b'data'\)
rel2, _ = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file2, cliente_id=5, contratto_id=None\)
assert rel2.startswith\('5/senza_contratto/'\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel2\)
print\('save_file without contratto OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('All tests passed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service

# Test path traversal è bloccato
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\('../../../etc/passwd'\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except ValueError as e:
    print\(f'Path traversal blocked in get_file_path: {e}'\)

try:
    storage_service.delete_file\('../../secrets'\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except ValueError as e:
    print\(f'Path traversal blocked in delete_file: {e}'\)

# Test percorsi legittimi funzionano ancora
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'content'\)
rel, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=None\)
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel\)
print\('Legitimate paths still work'\)

print\('All checks passed'\)
" 2>&)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app

client = TestClient\(app, raise_server_exceptions=False\)

# Helper: get auth token
def get_token\(\):
    r = client.post\('/api/v1/auth/login', data={'username': 'admin@docufiscal.it', 'password': 'admin123'}\)
    if r.status_code != 200:
        # Try to find any user
        return None
    return r.json\(\)['access_token']

token = get_token\(\)
if not token:
    print\('No auth token - checking validation logic without auth'\)

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'} if token else {}

# Test 1: MIME type not allowed \(.exe equivalent\)
import io
r = client.post\(
    '/api/v1/documenti/upload',
    data={'cliente_id': '1', 'tipo_documento': 'altro'},
    files={'file': \('malware.exe', io.BytesIO\(b'MZ content'\), 'application/x-msdownload'\)},
    headers=headers,
\)
print\(f'Test MIME not allowed: {r.status_code} \(expect 400 or 401\)'\)
if r.status_code == 400:
    print\(f'  Detail: {r.json\(\)[\\"detail\\"]}'\)

# Test 2: invalid tipo_documento
r = client.post\(
    '/api/v1/documenti/upload',
    data={'cliente_id': '1', 'tipo_documento': 'invalid_tipo'},
    files={'file': \('doc.pdf', io.BytesIO\(b'%PDF'\), 'application/pdf'\)},
    headers=headers,
\)
print\(f'Test invalid tipo: {r.status_code} \(expect 400 or 401\)'\)
if r.status_code == 400:
    print\(f'  Detail: {r.json\(\)[\\"detail\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from pathlib import Path
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from starlette.responses import StreamingResponse

# Simulate the generator with a real temp file
import tempfile, os
tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\(delete=False, suffix='.pdf'\)
tmp.write\(b'A' * 20000\)  # 20 KB — spans multiple 8 KB chunks
tmp.close\(\)

# Import the chunk constant and simulate the generator
from app.api.documenti import _DOWNLOAD_CHUNK_SIZE
assert _DOWNLOAD_CHUNK_SIZE == 8192

abs_path = Path\(tmp.name\)
chunks = []
with abs_path.open\('rb'\) as f:
    while chunk := f.read\(_DOWNLOAD_CHUNK_SIZE\):
        chunks.append\(chunk\)

assert len\(chunks\) == 3  # 8KB + 8KB + 4KB
assert sum\(len\(c\) for c in chunks\) == 20000
print\(f'Generator yields {len\(chunks\)} chunks for 20 KB file — OK'\)

os.unlink\(tmp.name\)

# Verify StreamingResponse import works
resp = StreamingResponse\(iter\([b'test']\), media_type='application/pdf', headers={'Content-Length': '4'}\)
print\(f'StreamingResponse media_type: {resp.media_type} — OK'\)

print\('All checks passed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
# google-genai potrebbe non essere installato ancora, verifichiamo solo la struttura senza importare google
from app.ai.classifier import BaseClassifier, ClassificationResult
import inspect

# Verifica che _build_prompt e classify abbiano le firme giuste
import ast, pathlib
src = pathlib.Path\('app/ai/gemini_classifier.py'\).read_text\(\)
tree = ast.parse\(src\)
methods = {
    node.name
    for cls in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(cls, ast.ClassDef\)
    for node in ast.walk\(cls\) if isinstance\(node, ast.FunctionDef\)
}
print\('Methods found:', sorted\(methods\)\)
print\('_DEFAULT_RESULT defined:', '_DEFAULT_RESULT' in src\)
print\('_MAX_TEXT_CHARS defined:', '_MAX_TEXT_CHARS' in src\)
print\('_RESPONSE_SCHEMA defined:', '_RESPONSE_SCHEMA' in src\)
print\('json.loads used:', 'json.loads' in src\)
print\('confidence clamp:', 'max\(0.0, min\(1.0' in src\)
")

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app.ai.prompts import build_classification_prompt, TIPO_DESCRIPTIONS, MAX_TEXT_CHARS

# Smoke test: prompt con e senza clienti
types = list\(TIPO_DESCRIPTIONS.keys\(\)\)
p1 = build_classification_prompt\('testo breve', types\)
assert 'fattura' in p1
assert 'TESTO DEL DOCUMENTO' in p1
assert 'CERCA' not in p1

p2 = build_classification_prompt\('testo', types, [{'nome': 'Mario', 'cognome': 'Rossi', 'codice_fiscale': 'RSSMRA'}]\)
assert 'Mario Rossi' in p2
assert 'CERCA DI IDENTIFICARE' in p2

# Truncation
long_text = 'x' * 5000
p3 = build_classification_prompt\(long_text, types\)
assert 'testo troncato' in p3

print\('prompts.py OK — MAX_TEXT_CHARS:', MAX_TEXT_CHARS\)
")
